script_text: When we read, we start on the LEFT side of the page. Then we move across to the RIGHT side.
voice_direction: Speak this in a natural, plain teacher voice — do NOT sing it, do NOT make it rhyme, do NOT chant. Calm and clear, like a teacher explaining a rule to a kindergarten student.

script_text: Left to right! That's how we read every single line.
voice_direction: Plain, matter-of-fact teacher voice. Do NOT sing. Do NOT chant. Just explain the rule clearly.

script_text: When you reach the end of a line, go down and start at the LEFT of the next line. Keep going — left to right, line by line!
voice_direction: Plain, matter-of-fact teacher voice. Do NOT sing. Do NOT chant. Explain the rule clearly and directly.
